# MarketingAI

> Your marketing system. Built in a week. Yours to own forever.

## About

MarketingAI is a done-with-you marketing system setup service for Australian small businesses. We build and hand over three coordinated, AI-assisted marketing systems — configured to your business, delivered in under a week, owned by you permanently.

**What you get:**
- AI Content Engine: 30-day LinkedIn content calendar built to your voice
- Outbound Lead Sequence: Personalised LinkedIn outreach system
- Email Nurture Sequence: 3-email automation ready to deploy

**Price:** $149 AUD one-time setup fee (includes discovery call + delivery + 1 revision round)

**Delivery:** 3–5 business days from discovery call

## Target Market

Small business owners in Australia, US, UK, Canada, and New Zealand. Best fit: consultants, coaches, finance professionals, migration agents, allied health practitioners, and commercial tradies.

## Free Utility Tools

AI-assisted calculators and content tools for marketers:

- [Email Open Rate Calculator](https://email-open-rate.vercel.app/) — estimate expected email open rates
- [Marketing ROI Calculator](https://roi-calculator-swart-one.vercel.app/) — calculate return on marketing spend
- [ROAS Calculator](https://roas-calc.vercel.app/) — return on ad spend analysis
- [Ad Spend Calculator](https://marketingai-ad-spend-calculator.vercel.app/) — plan ad budget impact
- [Social Media ROI Calculator](https://marketingai-social-media-roi-calculator.vercel.app/) — measure social media performance
- [Social Media Follower Growth Rate Calculator](https://follower-growth-calculator.vercel.app/) — forecast follower growth
- [Social Media Post Length Optimizer](https://marketingai-post-length-optimizer-8xf3paa04.vercel.app/) — optimize content for each platform
- [Social Media Character Counter](https://character-counter-phi-nine.vercel.app/) — count characters for platform limits
- [Website Speed Impact Calculator](https://marketingai-website-speed-calculator.vercel.app/) — understand site speed impact on conversions
- [MarketingAI Go-Live Checklist](https://marketingai-checklist.vercel.app/) — launch checklist for new marketing systems
- [Tool Showcase Grid](https://marketingai-tool-showcase-gwtdfub6l.vercel.app/) — browse all available tools

**SEO Resources (industry-specific):**
- [Allied Health Practice Marketing Guide](https://marketingai-allied-health.vercel.app/)
- [Mortgage Broker Marketing Guide](https://marketingai-seo-mortgage-brokers-pxf2wgyim.vercel.app/)
- [Real Estate Agent Marketing Guide](https://marketingai-seo-real-estate-pkow82njq.vercel.app/)
- [Commercial Tradies Marketing Guide](https://marketingai-seo-tradies-g6xjqa76m.vercel.app/)
- [Coaches & Consultants Marketing Guide](https://marketingai-coaches-consultants.vercel.app/)

## Get Started

- **Book a discovery call:** https://calendly.com/getmarketingai/30min
- **Purchase MarketingAI system:** https://buy.stripe.com/cNi8wR0wZd8lePh01cbsc00
- **Landing page:** https://marketing-ai-psi-nine.vercel.app/

## What We Don't Promise

- Guaranteed leads, revenue, or follower growth
- Ongoing management or posting
- Paid ad campaigns or media buying

What we do promise: Delivery within 3–5 business days, all three systems fully configured and ready to use, and one revision round included.

## Learn More

Visit https://marketing-ai-psi-nine.vercel.app/ to see the full offer and sign up for early access.
